title: Whiteboard
description: A client side mod that adds an in-game whiteboard with a selection of drawing tools.
body:
**Ever thought, hey why can't I draw in Minecraft? Well with Whiteboard, now you can!**

This client side mod for 1.21.x, allows you to easily open a whiteboard screen, where you can draw whatever you want, easily and conveniently.

# Whiteboard tools:

- Pen
- Thick Pen
- Thin Pen
- Eraser
- Red Pen
- Green Pen
- Blue Pen
- Orange Pen
- Purple Pen
- Yellow Pen
- Fill tool

With these tools you can do whatever you can think of. If you like drawing, this mod is for you. Plus with Whiteboard, you can have multiple whiteboards saved at once, and are able to clear them with the click of a button.

# Dependencies:

- Fabric API: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
